---
title: Teaching
---

::: {style="text-align: right; margin-bottom: 1em;"}
[Ver en español](teaching.es.html){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

## Courses

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}

### Undergraduate

- [Econometría I (ECOI)](teaching/econometria-i.html): undergraduate course on linear regression, inference, and diagnostics, taught in English with R. *Open textbook in preparation.*
- [Técnicas Cuantitativas I (TC1)](teaching/tecnicas-cuantitativas-i.html): first-year course on descriptive statistics, probability, and time series, with Excel and R labs.

:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}

### Postgraduate

- Máster Universitario en Técnicas Cuantitativas en Gestión Empresarial: modules in *Fundamentos Avanzados en Métodos Cuantitativos* and *Predicción Económica-Empresarial*.
- [Causal Inference](teaching/phd-causal-inference.html): PhD — short modules on causal inference for applied microeconometrics.

:::

::::

::: {.text-center style="margin: 2em 0; padding: 1em; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"}

**These PhD modules are also available as short courses for other institutions, PhD programmes, research institutes, firms, and public bodies — in English or Spanish.** [Get in touch](mailto:alessiogaggero@ugr.es) to discuss a fit for your programme.

:::

## Teaching projects

I'm developing inquiry-based and Socratic approaches to teaching quantitative methods at undergraduate level. More to follow as the work matures.
